CustomField.description: Rolling count of Constant Contact email opens by this Contact in the last 90 days (engagement/re-engagement filtering, DoD #3, Option A). Maintained by the inbound poller. JSI-107 / Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How many Constant Contact emails this contact has opened in the last 90 days (synced).
CustomField.label: Email Opens (Last 90 Days)
